problem id: 8243c91e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(4) XOR SHR(5)) AND ROT(1)

examples:
  11011010 -> 10100100
  01010100 -> 00000000
  11110001 -> 00000011
  10101100 -> 01000001
  00000111 -> 00000000
  11010010 -> 00100100
  10000010 -> 00000100
  11010110 -> 00100100
  00000001 -> 00000000

query: 10100110
predicted answer: 01000101
